mentions.note: Semiconductor capital equipment maker; second one on new-high list alongside AMAT, but Cramer warns chart looks risky post-purchase.
Semiconductor equipment maker; second chip capital equipment company on new-high list alongside AMAT. Charts very bad; avoid chasing.
Semiconductor capital equipment company (second on list after AMAT). On new high today but risky; Cramer notes both semi cap-equipment names bought after recent runs. Cyclical risk.
Semiconductor equipment; undersupplied in face of massive data center demand; persistent capacity constraints support valuation; same position as AMAT and LRCX.
Semiconductor manufacturing equipment; part of supply chain benefiting from undersupply.
